title: Turl Nevil
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Turl Nevil |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], ''[[Cheesmeer]]'', [[Realspace/Legends|deep-space]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'', which include Turl's [[Death/Legends|death]] on the ''[[Cheesmeer]]'' in [[Realspace/Legends|deep-space]], in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents=[[Kral Nevil]] |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] **[[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Kral, in the force we lost…did you have any family?''"
"''Yes sir. My son Turl. An ensign. A weapons officer aboard the frigate ''Cheesmeer''.|Jacen Solo and Kral Nevil|}} '''Turl Nevil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] serving in the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Second Fleet]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Reproduction/Legends|son]] of decorated [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kral Nevil]], he served as a [[Weapons officer/Legends|weapons officer]] aboard the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Cheesmeer]]''. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Turl was [[Death/Legends|killed]] as the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Five World Prime Minister]] [[Sadras Koyan]] ordered the firing of the [[hyperspace tractor beam]] onboard [[Centerpoint Station]], an ancient [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], during a [[Battle of the rendezvous point|skirmish]] at a [[Realspace/Legends|deep-space]] rendezvous point. The ensuing blast destroyed the majority of the Second Fleet, including the ''Cheesmeer'' and all Corellian forces present at the rendezvous point. In the aftermath, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], one of two [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chiefs of State]] of the Galactic Alliance, asked Kral if he had lost any family in the destruction. Kral responded by informing him of Turl's death. Later in the war, Kral would ask [[Cha Niathal]], the other Chief of State, to ensure his son did not die in vain.''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Turl Nevil was first mentioned in the novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'', written by [[Aaron Allston]] and published in [[2007]] as the seventh volume in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{1stm|[[Legacy of the Force: Fury (abridged audiobook)|audiobook]]}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Turl Nevil |es=Turl Nevil }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nevil, Turl}} [[Category:Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet officers]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
